title: alpinia trachyascus
intro: Alpinia trachyascus, also known as the lesser galangal, is a type of plant that belongs to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alpinia trachyascus include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea, and reduce fever. Alpinia trachyascus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is commonly found in traditional medicine practices in Southeast Asia.
